Warehousing & Transport · Agentic AI

Your warehouse,
on autopilot.

Stoqr is an agentic platform for warehousing and transport. AI agents receive, store, pick, pack, dispatch, and bill — across every zone, in every region.

Start a pilot →See how it works// First module live · July 2026

One platform · floor to invoice
Fulfilment + 3PL storageBonded + maritimeGDPR · PDPA · DPDPASG · IN · EU
The cost of the floor

Warehouses don’t lose money on rent. They lose it on operations.

Racking is the cheap part. The expensive part is everything that happens between the inbound dock and the invoice — and most of it still runs on paper, spreadsheets, and memory.

ISSUE 01

Manual everything

Storage lists keyed in by hand. GRNs chased over email. Pick paths worked out on the floor. Your team moves paper, not pallets — and every handoff is a place for error to hide.

ISSUE 02

No live view

Inventory lives in three spreadsheets and one supervisor's head. Clients call to ask where their goods are. So do you. By the time the answer arrives, it's already stale.

ISSUE 03

Billing that leaks

3PL charges get reconstructed from memory at month-end. Storage days, handling steps, and spare-part fees slip through. You're shipping value you never invoice.

How Stoqr works

Goods flow in, get stored, flow out — and Stoqr runs every step.

Every operation in Stoqr is a flow: an ordered sequence of steps your team defines once. Upload a list, Stoqr spins up a job, and agents execute it — recording quantities, validating documents, updating stock, and generating the paperwork automatically.

Zone 01 · Inbound

Receive

Drop a client's storage list as Excel or CSV. Stoqr parses it against your column mapping, creates a receiving job, and runs it through your flow.

  • Record quantities + flag variances
  • Update inventory to addressed bins
  • Generate GRN · supervisor sign-off
Zone 02 · Storage

Store & track

Every unit gets a QR-addressed home — down to floor, zone, aisle, rack, and level. Track by batch, lot, or serial with FEFO allocation, or store pallets and containers without ever opening them.

  • Pallet & container tracking
  • Cycle counts · ABC velocity
  • Bonded zones for customs stock
Zone 03 · Outbound

Pick, pack & dispatch

A packing list becomes an outbound job. Stoqr builds a location-ordered pick path, verifies every scan on pack, deducts stock, and produces a dispatch note with carrier and tracking.

  • FEFO / FIFO pick lists
  • Scan-verified packing
  • Dispatch note · carrier + tracking
The platform

One system, from the inbound dock to the invoice.

Eight modules built on a single flow engine and one source of inventory truth. Run fulfilment and 3PL storage in the same building — service type is set per job, not per client.

Module · Inventory

Inventory & warehouse layout

Map every warehouse to the bin. Multi-floor zones, QR-addressed locations, and a full storage-rules engine for dimensions, weight, temperature, and hazmat. Track SKUs to the each, or whole pallets you store and forward.

QR-addressedFEFO / FIFOBatch · Lot · Serial
Module · Inbound

Inbound & receiving

From storage list to shelf. Stoqr parses incoming files, opens a job, and walks it through receiving — quantities, variances, document checks, inventory update, and an auto-generated GRN.

File parsingVariance flagsAuto GRN
Module · Outbound

Outbound & dispatch

Pick, pack, dispatch. Location-ordered pick lists, scan-verified packing, automatic stock deduction, and dispatch notes carrying carrier, vehicle, driver, and tracking — visible to clients live.

Pick pathsPack scanningCarrier + tracking
Module · Procurement

Item requests & procurement

Clients ask, Stoqr sources. Requests flow through sourcing, PO, and receipt against a full supplier directory. Delivered POs auto-chain into an inbound job, then an outbound job on ship date.

Supplier directoryPO lifecycleAuto-chaining
Module · Maritime

Ship spares & bonded storage

Built for maritime clients. Track vessels by IMO, reserve parts to a specific ship, and clear customs inside the flow — TradeNet permits and Ship Stores Declarations as mandatory steps, bonded stock by zone.

IMO vesselsTradeNetBonded
Module · Billing

Billing & invoicing

Every move, metered. Step-level job billing, daily-snapshot storage billing, a wallet ledger for each debit and credit, and one auto-generated invoice per cycle — PDF in the cloud, corrections without rewriting history.

Job + storageWallet ledgerAuto invoice
Module · Compliance

Compliance & audit

Region-locked by design. GDPR, PDPA, and DPDPA built in — consent records, DSAR workflows with deadline tracking, breach timelines, and an immutable, hash-chained audit log of every action.

DSARHash-chained logData residency
Module · Client portal

Client portal

Your customers, self-served. A read-only window onto inventory, inbound, outbound, and invoices — with per-client visibility you control. One login spans every vendor a client works with.

Read-only viewsPer-client controlCross-vendor
Layer · Agentic

The agentic layer

Agents sit on top of every flow — watching jobs, reasoning about exceptions, and acting. They reallocate short picks, flag variances, retry failed steps, and escalate only what needs a human.

ObserveReasonAct
The agentic layer

Flows aren’t checklists. They’re agents.

A flow in Stoqr isn’t a static set of boxes to tick. Each job is watched by AI agents that understand what the step is for, notice when something’s wrong, and act on it — before a human has to.

The platform is backed by a logistics-trained small language model that sharpens with every job your warehouse runs. The more you operate, the better it gets at the work.

  • Self-healing jobs. Short pick on a line? The agent reallocates from another location and keeps the job moving instead of stalling for a supervisor.
  • Exceptions, not everything. Variances get flagged, retries get attempted, and only the genuinely unusual reaches a person. Your team manages the edge cases, not the routine.
  • A data flywheel. Every receipt, pick, and dispatch trains the model on your operation — so forecasts, allocations, and routing get sharper over time.
Agent log · JOB-8842OUTBOUND
09:14:02Pick list built · 14 lines · ordered by location
09:14:09⚠ short pick at F2-A03-R12-L4 · qty 6 of 10
09:14:10Agent → reallocating from F2-B07-R04-L2
09:14:11✓ resolved · line complete · no hold
09:18:44Pack verified · 3 cartons · 41.2 kg
09:19:01Stock deducted · dispatch note DSP-2207
09:19:02✓ job complete · billed to wallet
Built for the way you operate

From a single warehouse to a multi-region 3PL.

Stoqr scales its isolation to your size — shared, schema-isolated, or a dedicated database — so a small operator and an enterprise run on the same product with the data boundaries each one needs.

Starter

SMB warehouses

Single-site operators who want to retire the spreadsheets.

  • Full WMS: layout, inbound, outbound
  • QR labels and cycle counts
  • Self-serve onboarding
// Shared DB · row-level isolation
Professional

Third-party logistics

3PLs juggling many clients, many service types, one floor.

  • Per-client billing & invoicing
  • Client portal with controlled visibility
  • Bonded, maritime & procurement flows
// Schema-per-tenant isolation
Enterprise

Enterprise & regulated

Operations that need their data in their own region, full stop.

  • Dedicated database, optionally self-hosted
  • SSO, granular RBAC & audit
  • GDPR / PDPA / DPDPA residency
// Dedicated DB · EU · SG · IN
Trust & residency

Compliance isn’t a bolt-on.

It’s wired into the data model — so the goods, the documents, and the audit trail all stay where they’re supposed to.

Residency

Region-locked data

Personal data never leaves its region. Only non-PII metadata syncs across EU, Singapore, and Mumbai.

Subject rights

DSAR workflows

Access, erasure, rectification, and portability — with regime-specific deadline tracking built in.

Audit

Immutable log

Every action lands in an append-only, hash-chained audit log — IP, actor, and timestamp, partitioned by month.

Access

Scoped by design

Warehouse-scoped RBAC, SSO and MFA, single-use refresh tokens, and per-tenant security policy.

The team

Operators and builders shipping warehousing software out of Bangalore and Singapore.
